architecture_decisions.decision: Existing build process is functional - TypeScript compilation and Vite bundling work correctly
architecture_decisions.rationale: Running `npm run type-check` passes with no errors, `npm run build` completes successfully generating dist/ with index.html, CSS bundle (41.86 kB), and JS bundle (881.62 kB)

architecture_decisions.decision: Implement code-splitting to reduce bundle size
architecture_decisions.rationale: Current JS bundle is 881.62 kB - exceeds 500 kB threshold. Lazy loading of route components will reduce initial load time and improve perceived performance
Separate vendor dependencies (React, React Router, TanStack Query, Recharts) from application code for better caching and parallel loading
Ensure unused Tailwind CSS classes are removed in production build to minimize bundle size

frontend_tasks.purpose: Add manual chunk configuration for code-splitting
Implement lazy loading for route components using React.lazy
Create reusable loading component for Suspense boundaries
Production environment variables for API endpoints
Add build analysis script to track bundle sizes

e2e_tests.name: Build artifact validation
steps: Verify dist/assets directory contains CSS and JS bundles
Check bundle sizes are within acceptable limits

security_notes: Ensure API_BASE_URL is properly configured for production
Verify CORS headers are configured correctly in Vite proxy
Implement Content Security Policy headers in production
Validate environment variables are not bundled in client code
docker_changes: Update deployments/docker/Dockerfile.dashboard to copy production-specific files
Ensure dist/ directory is properly copied to nginx container
market_driven_features: Cost analytics dashboard - UI components for quota and cost tracking already exist in types and API services
Follow-me printing - PrintRelease page component with secure PIN release
Mobile printing SDK - API endpoints documented in services/api.ts for job creation
AI-powered intelligent routing - Infrastructure exists in job-service for routing algorithms
